evals.prompt: A skill's SKILL.md description was edited. Run /zoto-eval-update --apply and accept every proposed change.
evals.expected_output: Only generated cases for that skill are regenerated; the source_hash and last_updated are refreshed; user-authored cases in the same evals.json are untouched; manifest.history.yml has one new appended snapshot.
assertions: Only cases with _meta.generated === true on the affected target are modified
User-authored cases (no _meta, or _meta.generated === false) are byte-for-byte identical after the apply
Every regenerated case has a fresh _meta.source_hash matching the current target content_hash
Every regenerated case has a fresh _meta.last_updated in ISO-8601 format
manifest.yml updated_at is newer than its created_at
manifest.history.yml has exactly one new snapshot appended
Every accept/reject choice was presented via askQuestion

evals.prompt: Run /zoto-eval-update --check on a repo where a covered target has been deleted.
evals.expected_output: Exit code 2 (critical drift), stderr contains a JSON-line delta with kind=removed and critical=true. No file writes.
assertions: Stdout includes a 'removed' count in the summary line
Stderr includes at least one JSON-line delta with "kind":"removed" and "critical":true
No files were written (manifest.yml and evals.json files are unchanged)

evals.prompt: Edit discoveryTargets in config.json to add 'lib', then run /zoto-eval-update --check.
evals.expected_output: Exit code 0. The check does not report drift attributable to the config edit — rediscovery uses manifest.discovery_config.
assertions: The summary does not attribute drift to the config change
manifest.discovery_config is unchanged after the check
